subcodes.first_line: The Most Exalted Pen maketh mention of the handmaidens of God and counselleth them unto sanctification and detachment: O My handmaiden and [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قلم اعلی اماء الله را ذکر مینماید و بتقدیس و تنزیه وصیت میفرماید یا امتی و
subcodes.subjects: @power of the Manifestation of God, @role and station of women, @thankfulness; gratitude, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @purpose; goal of creation
